# Auto-generated by the projectmake utility
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
## Sets a policy that silences some errors associated with external libraries being deemed 'stale' 
if(POLICY CMP0135)
    cmake_policy(SET CMP0135 NEW)
endif()
project(FADE VERSION 1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

# #find all source files
file(GLOB_RECURSE ALL_SOURCES "src/*.cpp")
add_library(FADE STATIC ${ALL_SOURCES})
target_compile_options(FADE PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)
 
# Link libraries
include(FetchContent)

#### JSL
### For development purposes, it is quicker and easier to use the local library
### But other people will need to download it

option(FORCE_JSL_CLONE "Force a JSL clone instead of using a local copy" OFF)
set(LOCAL_JSL "/home/jfg/CodeProjects/JSL")
if((NOT FORCE_JSL_CLONE) AND (EXISTS "${LOCAL_JSL}/CMakeLists.txt"))
	message(STATUS "Using local JSL from ${LOCAL_JSL}")
	add_subdirectory("${LOCAL_JSL}" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/jsl_build")
else()
	message(STATUS "Using JSL from github")
	include(FetchContent)
		FetchContent_Declare(
		JSL
		GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/DrFraserGovil/JSL.git
		GIT_TAG        v3.1.0  
	)
	FetchContent_MakeAvailable(JSL)
endif()

### EIGEN
set(BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(EIGEN_BUILD_DOC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(EIGEN_BUILD_PKGCONFIG OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

FetchContent_Declare(
	Eigen
	URL https://gitlab.com/libeigen/eigen/-/archive/3.4.0/eigen-3.4.0.tar.gz
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(Eigen)





target_link_libraries(FADE PUBLIC JSL PRIVATE Eigen3::Eigen)



#give us a nice name
set_target_properties(FADE PROPERTIES PREFIX "")
set_target_properties(FADE PROPERTIES SUFFIX "")
set_target_properties(FADE PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "FADE.lib")


target_include_directories(FADE
PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
PRIVATE src
)

# If your library needs specific standard features (like C++20)
target_compile_features(FADE PUBLIC cxx_std_20)
